title: [Cloud] Flamingo - Connect headset already paired with charge case
scenario: Verify Voyager Legend 50 paired with Charge Case appears correctly in Poly Studio Mobile app and Cloud web page with earpiece and case details
steps: 1. Ensure the Voyager Legend 50 headset is already paired with its Charge Case.
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
3. On the Home screen, tap the '+' or 'Add Device' button to begin pairing.
4. Put the Voyager Legend 50 headset into pairing mode (press and hold the Bluetooth button until the LED flashes).
5. In the app, select the Voyager Legend 50 from the list of available devices to complete pairing.
6. Once paired, verify the device appears on the Home screen as 'Voyager Legend 50'.
7. Log in to the Poly Cloud web page (https://cloud.poly.com).
8. Navigate to the Devices section on the Cloud web page.
9. Confirm the device is listed as 'Voyager Legend 50 UC'.
10. Tap on the device name or details link to open the device details page.

11. On the device details page, verify the following are displayed:
    - Earpiece information
    - Charge case information
    - Device image
    - Component section
expected: The Voyager Legend 50 headset is successfully paired with the Poly Studio Mobile app, appears as 'Voyager Legend 50 UC' on the Cloud web page, and the device details page shows earpiece info, charge case info, device image, and component section.
